name: IDFC FIRST Mayura Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹10,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 10X Reward Points on dining and travel spends
5X Reward Points on all international transactions
2 Reward Points per ₹100 on all other purchases

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Additional 15,000 bonus Reward Points + fee waiver

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹50,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas

additionalBenefits: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access via Priority Pass
Low interest rate on revolving credit
pros: Unlimited lounge access worldwide via Priority Pass
10X rewards on dining and travel is excellent
cons: IDFC FIRST has smaller branch network than large banks
idealFor: Frequent travellers and diners seeking unlimited lounge access
High-income IDFC FIRST customers wanting a super-premium card

faqs.question: Is this IDFC FIRST's top-tier card?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Mayura is IDFC FIRST Bank's flagship super-premium credit card, offering unlimited lounge access and premium travel benefits.

faqs.question: Do reward points expire?
faqs.answer: No, IDFC FIRST Mayura reward points never expire as long as your card account is active.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹10,000 annual fee is waived on spending ₹10,00,000 or more in the previous year.

faqs.question: What airlines can I transfer points to?
faqs.answer: IDFC FIRST reward points can be transferred to select airline partners through the rewards portal. Check the latest partner list on the IDFC FIRST website.
